description_long: This is a large, oval-shaped egg with a matte white shell adorned by several large, irregular green spots distributed across its surface. The shell appears slightly textured, giving it a natural, somewhat rough look rather than a polished finish. The green spots are prominent and vary in size and placement, creating a distinctive and recognizable pattern. The egg is solid and robust, suggesting a hard shell typical of oversized or fantastical eggs. Its size and coloration make it stand out, and it would likely draw attention if placed in an urban environment. The overall appearance is whimsical and eye-catching, reminiscent of stylized or fictional eggs seen in games or media.
description: A large, white egg with prominent green spots and a slightly rough, matte surface. Its whimsical pattern and size make it visually striking.
description_view_0: The egg is shown with a large green spot facing forward and two additional green spots partially visible on the sides.
description_view_1: Three green spots are clearly visible, with two on the upper sides and one near the bottom, emphasizing the egg's patterned surface.
description_view_2: The view highlights two green spots on the upper sides and one at the bottom, with the white shell dominating the visible area.
description_view_3: A single large green spot is prominent in the center, with another spot partially visible at the lower right edge.
attribute_location: sidewalk, park lawn, playground, or decorative planter
attribute_orientation: upright with the broader end at the base and the pointed end facing up
attribute_contextual_placement: This object would most likely be encountered as a decorative or playful element in a public park, playground, or themed urban installation.
attribute_decorative_patterns: large, irregular green spots on a white background
